calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Michael S. Rossoff Esq., appearing for the Plaintiff The Tides Center, a California nonprofit public benefir corporation.
Witness Jack Mason MaClean sworn and examined of behalf of the Plaintiff.
No appearance by Defendant John Atchan.
Court ordered defendants Does 6-10 are dismissed without prejudice.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The rental agreement under wich the defendant holds possession of said premises, be and the same is hereby declared forfeited, void, and of no effect.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 730 Eddy Street, #407, San Francisco, CA 94109.
Damages $733.52
Attorney's Fees and costs are waived by the Plaintiff.

for a Total Judgment of $733.52
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Jan-22-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay ; Clerk: K. Liu ; Not Reported. (D501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff The Tides Center is present. Represented by Jack Maclean.
Attorney Michael Rossof appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant John Atchan is not present.


The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Jan. 22, 2013 remains on calendar. (D501)
